# Ad Rejection Reasons

**API Collection**

Review reasons for an ad rejection.

## Overview

Ads require approval by Apple. While in review, your [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Ad] is on hold. After approval, the [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/AdServingStatus] changes to `RUNNING` unless you schedule it to start on a specific date or [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Update-an-Ad] status to `PAUSED` while in review.



Use [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Find-Ad-Creative-Rejection-Reasons] or [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Gets-a-product-page-reason] to look up rejection reasons. See [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/ProductPageReason] for rejection reason descriptions.

## Ad Rejections

- **Find Ad Creative Rejection Reasons**: Fetches ad creative rejection reasons.
- **Get Ad Creative Rejection Reasons**: Fetches ad creative rejection reasons by custom product page ID.
- **Find App Assets**: Fetches app asset metadata by adam ID.

## Ad Rejection Reason Objects

- **AppAsset**: The app assets associated with an adam ID.
- **AppAssetListResponse**: The response to a request that returns a list of app assets.
- **ProductPageReason**: The ad creative rejection reason based on a product page.
- **ProductPageReasonListResponse**: The response to a request that returns a list of product page rejection reasons.
- **ProductPageReasonResponse**: A container for product page reasons.

## Data Types

- **ReasonLevel**: The level at which the system applies an ad rejection reason.

## Custom Product Page Ads

- **Ads**: Assign an ad creative to an ad group.
- **Creatives**: Create and manage ad creatives within your organization.
- **Custom Product Pages**: View Custom Product Page details.
